summary: Phase 2 Shadrasa CMS — full backend + frontend regression. 30/30 pytest backend tests pass (auth, contact/enquiry, site/* public, admin dashboard, Categories/Products/Banners CRUD, Content GET/PUT partial-update, enquiry/contact status update, validation 422 on missing fields, _id leak checks). Frontend e2e: homepage renders dynamic content from /api/site/content (hero 'Welcome to Shadrasa', products, contact info), admin login redirects to dashboard with stat cards (2 products, 2 categories, 4 banners, 5 enquiries, 4 contacts, 9 total leads), Add Product modal creates product that appears on public homepage, sidebar nav routes to /admin/categories, /admin/banners, /admin/content, /admin/dashboard work, Story/Content editor loads all sections, Logout clears session and redirects to /admin/login. Seeding is idempotent (admin user upserted on restart with new password; categories/products/banners only inserted if collection empty or by slug/name check).

minor.issue: Filters out keys whose value is None, so unsetting fields (e.g., setting description back to null) is not possible. Minor — same payload pattern as Pydantic Optional, acceptable for now.
Uses data.model_dump() (no exclude_none), so fields explicitly null in payload will overwrite stored values. Inconsistent with categories/content behavior — consider standardising.

issues: Console warning: 'An empty string ("") was passed to the src attribute' — likely an rendered when banner.image is empty or while loading. Not a functional issue, just noise — guard with `image ? : null` in Banners slider component.

action_items: Optional: guard src against empty string in Banner/Hero slider to silence console warning.
Optional: standardise PUT update payload handling (banners vs categories vs content) — currently banners overwrites with full dump while others use partial.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: seed_admin() correctly updates admin password if changed in env — good idempotency.
All /api/site/* and /api/admin/* endpoints exclude _id via projection {'_id': 0} — verified no leak in 30 test cases.
JWT auth supports both httpOnly cookie and Bearer header — admin frontend uses Bearer from localStorage, consistent.
Resend email gracefully no-ops when RESEND_API_KEY empty — verified via test_create_contact assertion email_sent=False.
Pydantic ContentIn uses all-Optional fields enabling true partial updates via update_one $set — verified preserves other fields.
No business-logic bugs found. All CRUD endpoints return appropriate 200/201/401/404/422 status codes.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_UI_Product via admin panel during e2e flow. Created/deleted multiple TEST_ prefixed categories/products/banners in pytest CRUD tests (auto-cleanup). Created TEST_C contact and TEST_E enquiry for status update tests (left in DB — prefixed for easy identification).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend has 30 pytest tests across backend_test.py (auth/contact/enquiry/admin basics) and test_cms.py (full CMS CRUD + site/* + content partial-update + status updates + _id leak + 422 validation). Both files use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL with fallback default. Run via: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. Admin token obtained via POST /api/auth/login with admin@shadrasa.com / Shadrasa@2026 → use as Bearer header. Frontend admin routes mounted under AdminLayout outlet at /admin/dashboard|products|categories|banners|content|enquiries|contacts. All interactive elements have data-testid (e.g., add-product-btn, pf-name, pf-description, pf-price, pf-stock, nav-products, nav-story-content, admin-logout). Resend email is intentionally disabled (key empty) and returns email_sent=False — not a bug.
rca of the issue: No critical issues found. Minor console warning on public homepage about empty img src — likely from banner slider rendering an before image data loads or when a banner has no image; non-blocking, fix is a conditional render guard in the banner component.
